caption: A man with a beard and tattoos on his right arm is recorded in a studio with grey acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional silver microphone held by a boom arm, which bears the text "Professional Studio Mic 2024". As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and looking slightly to his right. His mouth is partially open in the first two frames, then opens wider in the third, and by the final frame, his eyes widen and his mouth is open in an expression of surprise or emphasis. His head remains relatively stationary, and the background and equipment remain constant throughout the clip.
